problem: The Narada proper MCP package delegated read adapters to a bare narada executable. In Codex/MCP child process context on Windows, that executable was not resolvable. A first repair using shell execution of the .CMD shim reached the CLI but split arguments with spaces, producing a truncated inbox envelope.

repair.summary: Resolve the local Narada CLI through an explicit workspace invocation. On Windows, execute process.execPath with packages/layers/cli/dist/main.js so argv is preserved without shell splitting. Keep workspace node_modules/.bin prepended to PATH for package resolution.

verification: narada-proper MCP narada_inbox_submit_observation created env_2ccb1628-a612-487b-851d-9844a59b6524 with full payload
narada-proper MCP narada_inbox_show env_2ccb1628-a612-487b-851d-9844a59b6524 returned full title, summary, and recommendation
narada-proper MCP narada_inbox_work_next no longer reports spawnSync narada ENOENT
